feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Unidentified: Inside America’S UFO Investigation - S02E02 - The Triangle Mystery (1080)

link.title: Unidentified: Inside America’S UFO Investigation - S02E02 - The Triangle Mystery (1080)

entry.content: Former intelligence officer Chris Mellon spearheads an investigation into one of the UFO phenomenon’s great mysteries. Giant triangles allegedly capable of incredible acceleration and speeds have been seen all over the world, and even near major American cities. It is questioned what these objects are and what their purpose is. A new eyewitness may provide the answer. Mellon and the team come to a headline-making conclusion.
entry.summary: Former intelligence officer Chris Mellon spearheads an investigation into one of the UFO phenomenon’s great mysteries. Giant triangles allegedly capable of incredible acceleration and speeds have been seen all over the world, and even near major American cities. It is questioned what these objects are and what their purpose is. A new eyewitness may provide the answer. Mellon and the team come to a headline-making conclusion.

entry.title: Hajj 2020; Supreme Committee Evaluate the Preparation of hajj Oneindia Malayalam

link.title: Hajj 2020; Supreme Committee Evaluate the Preparation of hajj Oneindia Malayalam

entry.content:
Hajj 2020; Supreme Committee Evaluate the Preparation of hajj
കൊവിഡ് വൈറസ് വ്യാപനത്തിന്റെ പശ്ചാത്തലത്തില്‍ നടക്കുന്ന ഈ വര്‍ഷത്തെ ഹജ്ജ് കര്‍മ്മങ്ങളുടെ ഒരുക്കങ്ങള്‍ വിലിയിരുത്തി സൗദി ഹജ്ജ് മന്ത്രാലയം. ആഭ്യന്തര മന്ത്രിയും ഹജ്ജ് സുപ്രീം കമ്മിറ്റി ചെയര്‍മാനുമായ അബ്ദുല്‍ അസീസ് ബിന്‍ സൗദ് ബിന്‍ നെയ്ഫ് രാജകുമാരന്റെ അധ്യക്ഷ്യതയില്‍ സുരക്ഷാ ഏജന്‍സികളുടെ തലവന്മാരുമായും ഈ വര്‍ഷത്തെ ഹജ്ജ് തീര്‍ത്ഥാടനത്തിന്റെ ചുമതലയുള്ള ഉദ്യോഗസ്ഥരുമായും നടന്ന വെര്‍ച്വല്‍ യോഗത്തിലാണ് ഒരുക്കങ്ങള്‍ വിലിയിരുത്തിയത്.
entry.summary: Hajj 2020; Supreme Committee Evaluate the Preparation of hajj കൊവിഡ് വൈറസ് വ്യാപനത്തിന്റെ പശ്ചാത്തലത്തില്‍ നടക്കുന്ന ഈ വര്‍ഷത്തെ ഹജ്ജ് കര്‍മ്മങ്ങളുടെ ഒരുക്കങ്ങള്‍ വിലിയിരുത്തി സൗദി ഹജ്ജ് മന്ത്രാലയം. ആഭ്യന്തര മന്ത്രിയും ഹജ്ജ് സുപ്രീം കമ്മിറ്റി ചെയര്‍മാനുമായ അബ്ദുല്‍ അസീസ് ബിന്‍ സൗദ് ബിന്‍ നെയ്ഫ് രാജകുമാരന്റെ അധ്യക്ഷ്യതയില്‍ സുരക്ഷാ ഏജന്‍സികളുടെ തലവന്മാരുമായും ഈ വര്‍ഷത്തെ ഹജ്ജ് തീര്‍ത്ഥാടനത്തിന്റെ ചുമതലയുള്ള ഉദ്യോഗസ്ഥരുമായും നടന്ന വെര്‍ച്വല്‍ യോഗത്തിലാണ് ഒരുക്കങ്ങള്‍ വിലിയിരുത്തിയത്.

entry.title: Bagarre au Parc Astérix entre des jeunes et la sécurité du parc

link.title: Bagarre au Parc Astérix entre des jeunes et la sécurité du parc

entry.content: L’attraction Tonnerre de Zeus a été le théâtre d’une altercation entre des jeunes et la sécurité du parc. Si la direction se veut rassurante, des salariés confirment le climat délétère dénoncé par de nombreux visiteurs sur les réseaux sociaux.
entry.summary: L’attraction Tonnerre de Zeus a été le théâtre d’une altercation entre des jeunes et la sécurité du parc. Si la direction se veut rassurante, des salariés confirment le climat délétère dénoncé par de nombreux visiteurs sur les réseaux sociaux.

entry.title: Rajasthan Crisis: What next for Sachin Pilot?

link.title: Rajasthan Crisis: What next for Sachin Pilot?

entry.content: The difference between Rajasthan CM Ashok Gehlot and Congress leader Sachin Pilot is out there in public. Ashok Gehlot has accused Sachin Pilot of indulging in anti-party activities, whereas Sachin Pilot has said that Ashok Gehlot was trying to sideline him in the party. The clash between the two congress leader in Rajasthan has sparked many questions. Now, it will be interesting to see what Sachin Pilot will do.
entry.summary: The difference between Rajasthan CM Ashok Gehlot and Congress leader Sachin Pilot is out there in public. Ashok Gehlot has accused Sachin Pilot of indulging in anti-party activities, whereas Sachin Pilot has said that Ashok Gehlot was trying to sideline him in the party. The clash between the two congress leader in Rajasthan has sparked many questions. Now, it will be interesting to see what Sachin Pilot will do.

entry.title: Thüringen: Verfassungsrichter kippen Frauenquote

link.title: Thüringen: Verfassungsrichter kippen Frauenquote

entry.content: Fünfzig Prozent weiblicher Anteil, fünfzig Prozent männlicher auf den Wahllisten. Das Verfassungsgericht Weimar hat diese Forderung nur für Thüringen abgelehnt.
entry.summary: Fünfzig Prozent weiblicher Anteil, fünfzig Prozent männlicher auf den Wahllisten. Das Verfassungsgericht Weimar hat diese Forderung nur für Thüringen abgelehnt.

entry.title: MS Dhoni didn’t give enough quality players to Virat Kohli, Sourav Ganguly gave world-beaters: Gautam Gambhir

link.title: MS Dhoni didn’t give enough quality players to Virat Kohli, Sourav Ganguly gave world-beaters: Gautam Gambhir

entry.content: Former India opener Gautam Gambhir on Monday (July 13) said that ex-skipper Mahendra Singh Dhoni didn’t give enough ‘quality players’ to his successor Virat Kohli, while Dhoni’s predecessor Sourav Ganguly gave world-beaters to Team India.
entry.summary: Former India opener Gautam Gambhir on Monday (July 13) said that ex-skipper Mahendra Singh Dhoni didn’t give enough ‘quality players’ to his successor Virat Kohli, while Dhoni’s predecessor Sourav Ganguly gave world-beaters to Team India.

entry.title: Pesantren Tangguh Covid-19, Ratusan Santri Salafiyah Syafi’iyah Sukorejo Rapid Test

link.title: Pesantren Tangguh Covid-19, Ratusan Santri Salafiyah Syafi’iyah Sukorejo Rapid Test

entry.content:
JEMBER, KOMPAS.TV Ratusan santri Pondok Pesantren Salafiyah Syafi’iyah Sukorejo Situbondo, yang berasal dari Jember Jawa Timur menjalani rapid tes massal.
Ada 383 santri putra Pondok Pesantren Salafiyah Syafi’iyah Sukorejo Situbondo asal Jember, yang mengikuti rapid test pada Rabu (15/07).
Rapid test difasilitasi secara gratis oleh Gugus Tugas Percepatan Penanganan Covid-19 Kabupaten Jember.
Rapid test dilakukan di 4 titik, yakni terminal Tawang Alun, terminal Pakusari, lapangan Kecamatan Bangsalsari dan Terminal Arjasa.
Selain rapid test, santri juga mendapatkan sejumlah vitamin, obat-obatan, masker, peralatan sholat dan sosialisasi protokol kesehatan selama berada di pesantren.
Seorang santri bernama Muized Efendi mengaku senang difasilitasi rapid test, meski awalnya sempat takut. Rapid test gratis tersebut mempermudah ia beserta teman-teman lainnya untuk memenuhi syarat agar bisa kembal ke Pesantren.
Bupati Jember sekaligus Ketua Gugus Tugas Percepatan Penanganan Covid-19, Faida menegaskan bahwa rapid test santri merupakan salah satu upaya untuk menjadikan pondok pesantren tangguh Covid-19.
Pemerintah sendiri menargetkan 50 ribu santri asal Jember menjalani rapid test sebelum kembali ke pesantren.
Usai rapid test, santri diberangkatkan menuju pesantren dengan menggunakan 9 bus, yang dibiayai dengan anggaran Gugus Tugas Percepatan Penanganan Covid-19 Kabupaten Jember.
#Santri #PondokPesantren #RapidTest #PemkabJember
entry.summary: JEMBER, KOMPAS.TV Ratusan santri Pondok Pesantren Salafiyah Syafi’iyah Sukorejo Situbondo, yang berasal dari Jember Jawa Timur menjalani rapid tes massal. Ada 383 santri putra Pondok Pesantren Salafiyah Syafi’iyah Sukorejo Situbondo asal Jember, yang mengikuti rapid test pada Rabu (15/07). Rapid test difasilitasi secara gratis oleh Gugus Tugas Percepatan Penanganan Covid-19 Kabupaten Jember. Rapid test dilakukan di 4 titik, yakni terminal Tawang Alun, terminal Pakusari, lapangan Kecamatan Bangsalsari dan Terminal Arjasa. Selain rapid test, santri juga mendapatkan sejumlah vitamin, obat-obatan, masker, peralatan sholat dan sosialisasi protokol kesehatan selama berada di pesantren. Seorang santri bernama Muized Efendi mengaku senang difasilitasi rapid test, meski awalnya sempat takut. Rapid test gratis tersebut mempermudah ia beserta teman-teman lainnya untuk memenuhi syarat agar bisa kembal ke Pesantren. Bupati Jember sekaligus Ketua Gugus Tugas Percepatan Penanganan Covid-19, Faida menegaskan bahwa rapid test santri merupakan salah satu upaya untuk menjadikan pondok pesantren tangguh Covid-19. Pemerintah sendiri menargetkan 50 ribu santri asal Jember menjalani rapid test sebelum kembali ke pesantren. Usai rapid test, santri diberangkatkan menuju pesantren dengan menggunakan 9 bus, yang dibiayai dengan anggaran Gugus Tugas Percepatan Penanganan Covid-19 Kabupaten Jember. #Santri #PondokPesantren #RapidTest #PemkabJember

entry.title: KGF ಎಡಿಟರ್ ನಮ್ಮ ಸಿನಿಮಾ ಎಡಿಟ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ರು Raghu Samarth Filmibeat Kannada

link.title: KGF ಎಡಿಟರ್ ನಮ್ಮ ಸಿನಿಮಾ ಎಡಿಟ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ರು Raghu Samarth Filmibeat Kannada

entry.content:
OTT ಪ್ಲಾಟ್ ಫಾರ್ಮ್ ನಲ್ಲಿ ಬಿಡುಗಡೆ ಆಗುತ್ತಿರುವ ಮೊದಲ ಕನ್ನಡ ಚಿತ್ರ ಲಾ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ನಿರ್ದೇಶಕ ರಘು ಸಮರ್ಥ್ ತಮ್ಮ ಅನಿಸಿಕೆಗಳನ್ನು ಹಂಚಿಕೊಂಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ.
Director Raghu Samarth share his experience about his movie law
entry.summary: OTT ಪ್ಲಾಟ್ ಫಾರ್ಮ್ ನಲ್ಲಿ ಬಿಡುಗಡೆ ಆಗುತ್ತಿರುವ ಮೊದಲ ಕನ್ನಡ ಚಿತ್ರ ಲಾ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ನಿರ್ದೇಶಕ ರಘು ಸಮರ್ಥ್ ತಮ್ಮ ಅನಿಸಿಕೆಗಳನ್ನು ಹಂಚಿಕೊಂಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ. Director Raghu Samarth share his experience about his movie law

entry.title: Amical - Garcia : ‘On aurait dû gagner plus largement’

link.title: Amical - Garcia : ‘On aurait dû gagner plus largement’

entry.content: Grâce à des buts de Moussa Dembélé et de Memphis Depay, l’OL a battu le Celtic Glasgow (2-1), ce samedi soir, en match de préparation. Un succès qui fait plaisir à Rudi Garcia, forcément.
entry.summary: Grâce à des buts de Moussa Dembélé et de Memphis Depay, l’OL a battu le Celtic Glasgow (2-1), ce samedi soir, en match de préparation. Un succès qui fait plaisir à Rudi Garcia, forcément.

entry.title: Mera Dil Mera Dushman Episode 41 Teaser ARY Digital Drama

link.title: Mera Dil Mera Dushman Episode 41 Teaser ARY Digital Drama

entry.content:
Mera Dil Mera Dushman’ Is The Battle Of Love And Wealth
#MeraDilMeraDushman is a story of a young innocent girl Mairah, who gets married to a much older man Zafar for the exchange of money. Unfortunately, she comes face to face with the bitter reality that her one and only love Shameer is now her son-in-law. Hence, towards the end, Mairah’s step daughter Ayesha consolidates the relationship between Mairah and Zafar.
Alizey Shah as Mairah is a young and beautiful girl, who finds herself at odds as her parents get her married to an older man.
Yasir Nawaz as Zafar is a middle-aged arrogant man, who marries a young girl using his money.
Related: ARY Digital all set to roll-out three spectacular dramas
Noman Sami as Shameer loves Mairah but is not financially strong enough to win Mairah’s hand.
But Life has its own balance; Zafar’s son-in-law is love interest of his wife.
Anum Tanveer as Shaeena and Naveed Raza as Javed are Mariah’s Brother & Sister-in-Law.
Zafar’s younger brother and his wife are opportunists who rely on his money.
Mairah is left with no option but to adjust with Zafar and her stepchildren. She struggles to keep everyone happy but faces rude reactions which make her life difficult.
Directed By: Ali Raza (Usama)
Written By: Mirza Asim Baig
Cast:
Yasir Nawaz
#AlizeyShah
Noman Sami
Laiba Khan
Amna Malik
Salman Saeed
Shazia Gohar
Anam Tanveer
Naveed Raza
Akbar Islam
Gul E Rana
Fareeda Shabir
Fatima Sohail
Saba Shah
Malik Raza
Asiya Irshad
entry.summary: Mera Dil Mera Dushman’ Is The Battle Of Love And Wealth #MeraDilMeraDushman is a story of a young innocent girl Mairah, who gets married to a much older man Zafar for the exchange of money. Unfortunately, she comes face to face with the bitter reality that her one and only love Shameer is now her son-in-law. Hence, towards the end, Mairah’s step daughter Ayesha consolidates the relationship between Mairah and Zafar. Alizey Shah as Mairah is a young and beautiful girl, who finds herself at odds as her parents get her married to an older man. Yasir Nawaz as Zafar is a middle-aged arrogant man, who marries a young girl using his money. Related: ARY Digital all set to roll-out three spectacular dramas Noman Sami as Shameer loves Mairah but is not financially strong enough to win Mairah’s hand. But Life has its own balance; Zafar’s son-in-law is love interest of his wife. Anum Tanveer as Shaeena and Naveed Raza as Javed are Mariah’s Brother & Sister-in-Law. Zafar’s younger brother and his wife are opportunists who rely on his money. Mairah is left with no option but to adjust with Zafar and her stepchildren. She struggles to keep everyone happy but faces rude reactions which make her life difficult. Directed By: Ali Raza (Usama) Written By: Mirza Asim Baig Cast: Yasir Nawaz #AlizeyShah Noman Sami Laiba Khan Amna Malik Salman Saeed Shazia Gohar Anam Tanveer Naveed Raza Akbar Islam Gul E Rana Fareeda Shabir Fatima Sohail Saba Shah Malik Raza Asiya Irshad

entry.title: Au sommet européen, la chorégraphie des dirigeants pour se saluer en respectant les gestes barrières

link.title: Au sommet européen, la chorégraphie des dirigeants pour se saluer en respectant les gestes barrières

entry.title: 14 juillet : Stéphane Bern raconte les coulisses du grand concert de Paris

link.title: 14 juillet : Stéphane Bern raconte les coulisses du grand concert de Paris

entry.content:
Mardi 14 juillet au soir, aura lieu un grand spectacle de feux d’artifice, mais cette année, sans spectateur, tout comme le grand concert de la fête nationale.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Mardi 14 juillet au soir, aura lieu un grand spectacle de feux d’artifice, mais cette année, sans spectateur, tout comme le grand concert de la fête nationale. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Controversy sparked over AMU student’s complaint on Hijab

link.title: Controversy sparked over AMU student’s complaint on Hijab

entry.content: An engineering student of Aligarh Muslim University (AMU) has got a threat on social media. The Hindu student wrote a post in which she has written about how Hindu girls are being forced to cover themselves in AMU hostels. On this tweet of the student, a fellow student of AMU has sent a threatening reply. The scared student has sent a complaint to AMU administration and police. The AMU administration has set up an investigation in the case, while the police has registered an FIR. Watch video.
entry.summary: An engineering student of Aligarh Muslim University (AMU) has got a threat on social media. The Hindu student wrote a post in which she has written about how Hindu girls are being forced to cover themselves in AMU hostels. On this tweet of the student, a fellow student of AMU has sent a threatening reply. The scared student has sent a complaint to AMU administration and police. The AMU administration has set up an investigation in the case, while the police has registered an FIR. Watch video.

entry.title: Pilot removed as Deputy CM: What Ashok gehlot has to say?

link.title: Pilot removed as Deputy CM: What Ashok gehlot has to say?

entry.content: Rebel Sachin Pilot has been removed as the Rajasthan Deputy Chief Minister, Congress spokesperson Randeep Singh Surjewala announced on Tuesday. The development came as Sachin Pilot, despite several attempts of Congress to woo him back, remained defiant. After the action on Pilot, Chief Minister Ashok Gehlot met with the Rajasthan Governor Kalraj Mishra. CM Ashok Gehlot also interacted with media over the govt crisis. Watch video.
entry.summary: Rebel Sachin Pilot has been removed as the Rajasthan Deputy Chief Minister, Congress spokesperson Randeep Singh Surjewala announced on Tuesday. The development came as Sachin Pilot, despite several attempts of Congress to woo him back, remained defiant. After the action on Pilot, Chief Minister Ashok Gehlot met with the Rajasthan Governor Kalraj Mishra. CM Ashok Gehlot also interacted with media over the govt crisis. Watch video.

link.title: Knowing Bros 237-3 by KBForYou1

entry.content:
Hello! We made a sub team for Knowing Brothers
For the latest update find us on twitter @KBForYou1
You can show your support by contributing via paypal here
For Indonesian nationals you can contribute via gopay/ovo/dana/linkaja/shopeepay to this number (0878-5980-3980)
Malaysian nationals can use Touch ‘n Go and Indians can use GooglePay (QR codes are available on our twitter)
Have a nice day~

We made a sub team for Knowing Brothers For the latest update find us on twitter @KBForYou1 You can show your support by contributing via paypal here For Indonesian nationals you can contribute via gopay/ovo/dana/linkaja/shopeepay to this number (0878-5980-3980) Malaysian nationals can use Touch ‘n Go and Indians can use GooglePay (QR codes are available on our twitter) Have a nice day~

entry.title: ಕೋಟಿ ಬೆಲೆಯ ಕಾರುಗಳನ್ನು ಬಿಟ್ಟು ಟ್ರ್ಯಾಕ್ಟರ್ ಏರಿದ ಡಿ ಬಾಸ್.

link.title: ಕೋಟಿ ಬೆಲೆಯ ಕಾರುಗಳನ್ನು ಬಿಟ್ಟು ಟ್ರ್ಯಾಕ್ಟರ್ ಏರಿದ ಡಿ ಬಾಸ್.

entry.content:
ದುಬಾರಿ ಕಾರ್ ಗಳನ್ನು ಬಿಟ್ಟು ಟ್ರಾಕ್ಟರ್ ಏರಿದ ದರ್ಶನ್ !
Kannada actor challenging star Darshan purchase a new tractor
entry.summary: ದುಬಾರಿ ಕಾರ್ ಗಳನ್ನು ಬಿಟ್ಟು ಟ್ರಾಕ್ಟರ್ ಏರಿದ ದರ್ಶನ್ ! Kannada actor challenging star Darshan purchase a new tractor

entry.title: Yuan Long Episode 3 Eng Sub

link.title: Yuan Long Episode 3 Eng Sub

entry.content: Wang Sheng, the protagonist, is a special force sniper on earth. During a special air mission, he accidentally crossed the Yuan Soul world and entered it. Even so, Wang Sheng did not give up but relied on the skills and accumulation of strong knowledge and beliefs that were trained on earth to come out of his own sky and realize the goldfish jumped the dragon gate, so as not to flow into the soul from the soul to become a strong person.
entry.summary: Wang Sheng, the protagonist, is a special force sniper on earth. During a special air mission, he accidentally crossed the Yuan Soul world and entered it. Even so, Wang Sheng did not give up but relied on the skills and accumulation of strong knowledge and beliefs that were trained on earth to come out of his own sky and realize the goldfish jumped the dragon gate, so as not to flow into the soul from the soul to become a strong person.

entry.title: La riconferma di Duda, il giorno dopo: meglio o peggio per i polacchi?

link.title: La riconferma di Duda, il giorno dopo: meglio o peggio per i polacchi?

entry.content: La sofferta e risicata vittoria di Andrzej Duda al ballottaggio presidenziale in Polonia permette al governo di destra del PiS del premier Morawiecki, di cui fa parte lo stesso Duda, di poter continuare nella sua discussa politica nazionalista. Cercando di controllare i media e la magistratura. View on euronews
entry.summary: La sofferta e risicata vittoria di Andrzej Duda al ballottaggio presidenziale in Polonia permette al governo di destra del PiS del premier Morawiecki, di cui fa parte lo stesso Duda, di poter continuare nella sua discussa politica nazionalista. Cercando di controllare i media e la magistratura. View on euronews
